results.reason: The settlement is enclosed by a wall, which serves as a natural boundary.
results.title: Bounded perimeter

results.reason: The paths do not branch and curve around buildings with varied width. They appear to be uniform straight geometric spines.
results.title: Organic branching paths

results.reason: Path rhythm and door alignment are not present in the image. The paths do not have compression/release and bends, nor do they meet building fronts at their doors.
results.title: Path rhythm and door alignment

results.reason: The building footprints are uniform and do not differ in massing. There is no clear icon-differentiated material identity.
results.title: Varied building massing

results.reason: There is a single re-tinted material over flat ground, which does not provide real contrast.
results.title: Distinct material identity

results.reason: Decoration scatters through the walkable interior, but it is sparse and does not cluster at walls, path edges, or pockets.
results.title: Decoration density

results.reason: There is no dominant landmark that clearly dominates the first read; the eye has nothing specific to move toward.
results.title: Dominant landmark

results.reason: The first view does not immediately say what kind of place this is and does not promise something beyond the current screen.
results.title: Readable first view

results.reason: Reward / curiosity objects are lone unstyled markers in empty space, rather than dressed reward clusters.
results.title: Dressed reward clusters

results.reason: There is no water or organic plaza present in the image.
results.title: Water or organic plaza

results.reason: A limited, inconsistent material vocabulary is reused throughout the map, rather than each area introducing unrelated materials.
results.title: Limited coherent vocabulary

results.reason: backend did not address this criterion
results.title: Memorable identity
